name: eva
description: Eleven composable, scope-adaptive Claude Code skills for compound engineering: reverse-engineer an unfamiliar file (local or URL) into a structural map, brainstorm a PRD, spec the design, cross-review the pair, diagnose bugs, audit stable code for structural debt, execute via red-green-refactor TDD (or REFACTOR mode against an audit), review the diff with a multi-reviewer pipeline, triage incoming PR review feedback into actionable verdicts, commit-push with safety gates, and capture durable learnings — each skill produces a single cold-readable artifact (TEARDOWN / PRD / SPEC / REVISION / DIAGNOSIS / AUDIT / EXECUTION / CODE-REVIEW / PR-FEEDBACK / SOLUTIONS) and is gated on explicit user approval before any write. Refuses protected branches, never opens PRs, never `git add -A`, never `--force`, never `--no-verify`, never commits secrets, never posts to a PR on the author's behalf.
